title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入巴基斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入巴基斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Pakistan PSQCA standards practice, IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence, UN 38.3 transport, NEPRA grid or storage project review, fire-safety review, and China GB references.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与巴基斯坦PSQCA标准实践、IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据、UN 38.3运输、NEPRA并网或储能项目审查、消防安全审查和中国GB依据差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與巴基斯坦PSQCA標準實務、IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據、UN 38.3運輸、NEPRA併網或儲能項目審查、消防安全審查和中國GB依據差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, PSQCA scope determination, Pakistan Standard adoption decision, NEPRA licence or grid-connection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, designers, and installers should verify current Pakistan PSQCA, NEPRA, grid, fire-safety, transport, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, contracting, energisation, or commissioning.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、PSQCA适用范围裁定、巴基斯坦标准采标决定、NEPRA许可证或并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商、设计方和安装方在出货、签约、送电或调试前，应与合格专业人士核验现行巴基斯坦PSQCA、NEPRA、电网、消防安全、运输及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、PSQCA適用範圍裁定、巴基斯坦標準採標決定、NEPRA許可證或併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、簽約、送電或調試前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴基斯坦PSQCA、NEPRA、電網、消防安全、運輸及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Pakistan, do not assume a blanket mandatory whole-unit lithium BESS PSQCA certificate unless the exact HS code, Pakistan Standard, compulsory-item listing, tender, importer route, or authority decision calls it up. The main gaps are confirmation of any PSQCA adoption or acceptance of IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence, UN 38.3 transport documentation, NEPRA and utility grid approval for storage assets, project fire-safety review, and clause mapping from China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口巴基斯坦时，除非具体HS编码、巴基斯坦标准、强制产品清单、招标、进口商路径或主管机关决定明确要求，不应假定整套锂电BESS一概需要PSQCA强制证书。主要差距包括确认PSQCA是否采纳或接受IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据、UN 38.3运输文件、储能资产相关NEPRA和电网并网批准、项目消防安全审查，以及与中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023的条款映射。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口巴基斯坦時，除非具體HS編碼、巴基斯坦標準、強制產品清單、招標、進口商路徑或主管機關決定明確要求，不應假定整套鋰電BESS一概需要PSQCA強制證書。主要差距包括確認PSQCA是否採納或接受IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據、UN 38.3運輸文件、儲能資產相關NEPRA和電網併網批准、項目消防安全審查，以及與中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023的條款映射。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
